name: slopsmith-plugin-camera-director
description: Floating bilingual control panel to author, save and share the Slopsmith 3D Highway camera (orbit, pan, zoom, tilt, height).

optionalDependencies.comment: GSAP is optional. If you vendor it and expose window.gsap, Camera Director will use it for preset transitions; otherwise a built-in rAF tween is used. Three.js is provided by Slopsmith core (static/vendor/three).
